newsArray.title: IPL 2026: Bowling woes threaten MI campaign as Bumrah struggles without support
newsArray.description: Jasprit Bumrah's wicketless streak is impacting Mumbai Indians' IPL 2026 campaign, with the team struggling overall. Despite Bumrah's best economy rate, MI's bowling unit has taken few wickets, conceding high scores. Support bowlers are failing to create pressure, leading to mounting losses and a desperate need for the team to regroup and find momentum.

newsArray.title: RR vs SRH, 36th Match, IPL 2026 Squad, Captain, Time, Date, Venue | Rajasthan Royals vs Sunrisers Hyderabad, 36th Match, Ticket details
newsArray.description: Get the RR vs SRH, 36th Match, IPL 2026 Captain, Playing XI Squad, Players List | Rajasthan Royals vs Sunrisers Hyderabad, 36th Match, Indian Premier League 2026 Date, Time, Venue, and Ticket details only on Indiacricketschedule.com RR vs SRH, 36th Match, Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 - Rajasthan Royals Cricket team will play 36th Match of Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 against Sunrisers Hyderabad Cricket Team, where the 36th Match of 74 T20s matches of IPL 2026 will be played on Saturday, April 25, 2026. The RR vs SRH, 36th Match will be played at Sawai Mansingh Stadium, Jaipur, and will get started at 07:30 PM LOCAL. The toss of the match will be done 30 minutes before the start of the match at 07:00 PM. The Rajasthan Royals team will be captained by Riyan Parag in the match and the Sunrisers Hyderabad team will be captained by Ishan Kishan. Here are the full details of the Rajasthan Royals vs Sunrisers Hyderabad, 36th Match, IPL 2026 Timing, Captain, Squad or Players List.
